name: Contrel Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Contrel Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of LCD equipment in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers panel automation products, such as CF/TFT whole plant, LCD whole factory panel, and RTP/RTS whole line panel transmission equipment integration system, as well as pack/unpack equipment; panel process equipment; and glass appearance inspection, burr check, electrical testing, light on test, MACRO, and mini LED test equipment, as well as PAD inspection machine. It also provides semiconductor automation solutions, such as EFEM integrated system, OHS automated handling system, storage systems, and automatic optical inspection products, as well as laser cutting, pattering, drilling, and repair equipment. In addition, the company offers laser equipment, including TFT array and LCD cell repair equipment, LCD bright point repair systems, OLED dark point repair equipment, circuit missing line repair machine, carbonization machine, glass cutting machine, OLED mask clean equipment, and laser marking/automatic optical inspection systems; logistic systems, including sorting system, automatic warehouse and handling system, and intelligent logistics equipment; LED vacuum coating equipment, such as glue, evaporation, optical, and continuous sputtering machine; and micro nano products. Contrel Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.
